paddingX=3
paddingY=3
graph TD
subgraph Frontend
    UI --> API
end
subgraph Backend
    API --> Database
    API --> Cache
end
---
+------------+            
| Frontend   |            
|+----------+|            
||    UI    ||            
|+----------+|            
|      |     |            
|      |     |            
|      v     |            
|+----------+|            
||   API    |-------+     
|+----------+|      |     
+------|-----+      |     
       |            |     
       |            |     
+------|------------|----+
|      v Backend    v    |
|+----------+   +-------+|
|| Database |   | Cache ||
|+----------+   +-------+|
+------------------------+
